command_redacted:
cd /home/bharris/github.com/bharrisau/nosh
echo "=== ssh-agent identities ==="
ssh-add -L 2>&1 | head
echo "=== SSH_AUTH_SOCK set? ==="
[ -n "$SSH_AUTH_SOCK" ] && echo "yes: $SSH_AUTH_SOCK" || echo "NO agent socket in this env"
echo "=== client/server CLI flags (help) ==="
grep -rn "long = \|about = \|--addr\|--port\|--host-key\|--authorized-keys\|--identity\|--known-hosts\|--host\|--shell" crates/nosh-server/src/main.rs crates/nosh-client/src/main.rs 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "long|addr|port|host|identity|known|shell|auth" | head -40
description: Check ssh-agent and the binaries' CLI flags

command_redacted:
set -e
D=/tmp/nosh-demo
mkdir -p "$D"
# Server host identity (ed25519), no passphrase
[ -f "$D/host_ed25519" ] || ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -N '' -f "$D/host_ed25519" -C nosh-demo-host >/dev/null
# Client identity (ed25519) — will be added to YOUR agent in terminal B
[ -f "$D/client_ed25519" ] || ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -N '' -f "$D/client_ed25519" -C nosh-demo-client >/dev/null
# Authorize the client key on the server
cp "$D/client_ed25519.pub" "$D/authorized_keys"
# Fresh known_hosts (TOFU will populate on first connect)
: > "$D/known_hosts"
chmod 600 "$D"/*_ed25519 "$D/authorized_keys"
echo "Demo material ready in $D:"
ls -l "$D"
echo "client pubkey:"; cat "$D/client_ed25519.pub"
description: Pre-stage scratch host key, client key, authorized_keys

command_redacted: cd /tmp && rm -f vkey vkey.pub && ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -N '' -f /tmp/vkey -q 2>/dev/null && echo "=== ssh-keygen fingerprint ===" && ssh-keygen -l -E sha256 -f /tmp/vkey.pub && echo "=== pubkey line ===" && cat /tmp/vkey.pub
description: Generate test key and get reference fingerprint

command_redacted:
# Generate a temporary encrypted key to use as fixture
ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -f /tmp/test_enc_key -N "testpass" -q 2>/dev/null
cat /tmp/test_enc_key
